channel.title: Skin on VitaminDWiki
channel.description: Recent content in Skin on VitaminDWiki

item.title: Nails treated by Vitamins (D etc.)
item.description:
Vitamins for the Management of Nail Disease: A Literature Review

Skin Appendage Disord (2024) 10 (2): 104–122. https://doi.org/10.1159/000534972

Kaya L. Curtis; Shari R. Lipner

Background: Vitamins have gained popularity among physicians and patients for purported benefits to hair, skin, and nail health. Safe and efficacious therapies for nail disorders, many of which are chronic conditions, are needed.

Summary: We conducted a literature review of studies assessing the efficacy of oral, topical, and intralesional vitamin/vitamin derivatives for the treatment of nail disorders, including yellow nail syndrome, brittle nail syndrome, onychomycosis, habit-tic nail deformity, periungual/subungual verruca, and nail psoriasis.

item.title: Accutane for acne associated with birth defects, abortions
item.description:
Surge in Usage of Acne Medication Linked to Birth Defects Prompts In-Depth Analysis of Pregnancy Outcomes

TrialSiteNews Reporting on:

Use of isotretinoin among girls and women of childbearing age and occurrence of isotretinoin-exposed pregnancies in Germany: A population-based study

January 25, 2024 https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pmed.1004339

  • “This finding and the fact that at least 45% of exposed pregnancies (74 of 164) in our study ended in an induced abortion —as compared to 4% when all pregnancies …”

Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki
